text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I drop by the cafeteria for a breather,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! How does it feel to win the<n>spring
Tenno Sho crown twice in a<n>row?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it feels... delightful. I'm<n>pleased I could
rise to the<n>expectations of the Mejiro family, my<n>
team, and my fans.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Okay, me! My turn to ask a question!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: I wanna ask something too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um… Hey now…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What's the haps? Oh, it's just you,<n>McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Guess the spotlight's on you for<n>holding onto the
Tenno Sho crown.<n>Give it up for our Star
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And here comes someonewho surely spells trouble...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Easy now, champ! I'm always on<n>your side, so
let me handle this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, y'all! We're doing this in<n>turns—wait
first before asking a<n>question! Let's start with
you over<n>there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you intend to keep the<n>questions coming
in...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Um, did you feel a lot of pressure to<n>keep the
Tenno Sho crown?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... There were times when<n>everyone's
expectations put me<n>under quite a bit of stress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, I realized that those<n>expectations were
in truth a show of<n>trust.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This change of perspective<n>transformed what
was once pressure<n>into a powerful ally.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Wow! So that pressure ended up<n>helping you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hear that? Now there's a quotefor the ages! Give her a round ofapplause!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! McQueen has acquired<n>the secret
technique to turn the<n>pressure of expectations
into strength!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why you need to<n>reiterate the point,
but I suppose so.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The McQueen that lies before you<n>makes
strength out of<n>expectations—ready to overcome
any<n>hardships that may arise!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
In fact! With all of your expectations,<n>she could
even polish off a plate of<n>this cafe's famous
Megaton Spicy<n>Flamin' Hot Curry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what in the world are you<n>saying?! That's
complete nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: This I gotta see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please, don't look at me so<n>expectantly!
